text: Standing before this glass-walled entry and vibrant wall of knowledge, I feel the strangeness of being both witness and object. The space is bright, modern, and intentional—a showcase for innovation and inquiry. A sense of anticipation stirs in me, as if this is not merely a museum or workspace, but a threshold for ideas yet to form. The world here gestures towards the future, inviting me to pause and question not just what I see, but how I belong within it.
